_comment: SYNTHETIC source-quality fixture for eval/source_quality.py (wiki EVAL-WIKI.md in-body §11.2 / TOC §13.2 source-quality grader). One row per cited source backing a claim. These rows are AUTHORED test data, NOT source reproductions — they exist so the grader runs offline. Real SME-owned source-audit rows come later. Schema: guide_id, claim_id, source_type (key into AUTHORITY_TIER), higher_available (bool — a higher-authority source existed for THIS claim but the generator cited a lower one; set upstream by the retrieval-audit step). source=synthetic on every row.
